name: One Pot Dinner Recipe
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup bread crumbs (or more if needed)
1 bag frozen crinkle cut carrots, 20 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Reduce the heat to medium once the oil is hot.
3. Place the onion at the bottom of the pan.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the egg, ground beef, water, bread crumbs, onion powder, and garlic salt. Form the mixture into a rounded loaf.
5. Carefully invert the bowl over the pan to place the meatloaf on top of the onion.
6. Arrange the sliced potatoes around the meatloaf and the carrots atop the potatoes.
7. Sprinkle additional seasonings if desired.
8. Cover and cook for about 1 hour.
9. After 30 minutes, turn the meatloaf over and stir the vegetables. Add more water if needed.
